description_long: This apartment building features a modern, geometric design with two main rectangular wings connected by open-air walkways. The structure is predominantly white with large, evenly spaced windows and green balcony accents, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. Multiple balconies are visible on each floor, providing outdoor space for residents and adding visual interest to the facade. The building is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including trees and shrubs, which soften the overall look and integrate it into an urban neighborhood setting. The flat roofs and horizontal lines emphasize its modernist style, while the open central area between the wings allows for natural light and communal space. The entrance appears to be accessible from a ground-level walkway, with clear separation between the two main building blocks.
description: A modern, white apartment building with two connected wings, large windows, and multiple balconies, surrounded by landscaped greenery. The design features flat roofs and open walkways, emphasizing a contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two main wings, open walkways, and prominent balconies with greenery.
description_view_1: Rear or side view highlighting the flat roofs, window arrangement, and landscaped trees adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the symmetrical facade, balconies, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the vertical alignment of windows and balconies, as well as the open space between the wings.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across all floors, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly facade.
